title: gerbera cineraria
intro: Gerbera cineraria, also known as the Cape marigold or African daisy, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Gerbera cineraria include reducing anxiety and stress, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Gerbera cineraria can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of health issues, from digestive problems to skin conditions.
